$comment: Machine-readable schema fixture for docs/cycle-digest.jsonl (issue #953 §4). Single source of truth read by tests/test-issue-953-cycle-digest.sh to jq-validate each JSONL line's shape. Mirrors the tests/fixtures/gate-schema.json precedent the gate hook consumes (check-autoflow-gate.sh:220). Field names are CANONICAL per feature design §4 (terminal_cycle/gates/below7/escaped_defects/review_max_severity) — do not diverge to the earlier draft names (cycle/per_gate/sub7_items/escaped_defect) or the pre-#979 name codex_max_severity (renamed backend-neutral, issue #979 AC-7).
